name: rubber-duck
description: Spec-driven agent workflows for planning, frontend design, implementation, review, and safe shipping.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven planning, frontend design, review, and commit workflows.
interface.longDescription: Turn fuzzy software work into concise PRDs, reviewed implementation plans, evidence-backed diagnoses, polished frontend design systems, orchestrated implementation passes, structured code reviews, and deliberate commit/push flows.
defaultPrompt: Use Rubber Duck to write a PRD for this feature.
Use Rubber Duck to plan this implementation.
Use Rubber Duck orchestrate-implementation to coordinate this approved plan.
Use Rubber Duck frontend-design to renovate this frontend while preserving product identity.
Use Rubber Duck to review my local diff.
Use Rubber Duck setup-codex-agents to install reviewer agents.
